overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a wizard character exploring a gothic castle interior. The character walks through narrow stone corridors with medieval tapestries, enters a grand common room with green marble columns and a fireplace, approaches bright arched windows, then turns back and ascends a monumental staircase toward a domed skylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with hanging tapestries and wall sconces

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor, passing medieval tapestries and stone walls

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
medieval wall-mounted lantern with warm orange flame
large hanging textile depicting heraldic designs
full plate armor standing against the wall
framed painting with magical green glowing light beneath it

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor lined with medieval tapestries and wall sconces. A suit of armor stands against the right wall, and a portrait with an eerie green flame hangs nearby. The atmosphere is enclosed and intimate with warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with fireplace and tall arched windows

events.description: exits narrow corridor into large common room with lit fireplace and green marble columns
approaching bright arched windows with intense green-tinted natural light flooding the space

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room toward the large windows, passing sofas and furniture

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing near the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and decorative mantelpiece
tall green-veined marble column supporting the ceiling
tall gothic arched window with bright light streaming through
intricate patterned carpet covering the marble floor
upholstered seating furniture with tufted green velvet

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand common room with green marble columns and a large fireplace. The character walks across an ornate rug toward tall arched windows that flood the space with bright green-tinted natural light. A student stands near the fireplace as the camera approaches the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room return path with furniture and other students

events.description: character turns around at the windows and walks back toward the fireplace area

agents.ego_description: turning around at the windows and walking back through the common room, passing other students

notable_agents.action: student in green scarf walking past the camera

entered.detail: dark wood display cabinet with glass doors
small wooden side table with curved legs

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the bright windows and walks back through the common room. The fireplace becomes visible again in the center as the camera moves past a wooden cabinet and other students. The lighting shifts from bright natural light back to the warmer mixed lighting of the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with domed ceiling and statue

events.description: approaching grand staircase with ornate stone balustrades and domed ceiling
beginning to ascend the staircase toward the statue under the domed skylight

agents.ego_description: walking toward and ascending the grand staircase, approaching the statue at the top

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure or statue standing at the top of the stairs under the dome

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with ornate carved balustrades
circular domed ceiling with bright skylight opening at the center
ornate carved stone railing along the staircase
tall stone statue standing in the archway at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and ascends a grand staircase with ornate stone balustrades. Above, a domed ceiling with a bright skylight illuminates the space. A statue stands at the top of the stairs, and the architecture features intricate gothic details and wall sconces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit corridor into a vast, light-filled common room. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow stone hallway lined with medieval tapestries and wall sconces, passing a suit of armor and a portrait illuminated by an eerie green flame. As the character advances, the enclosed space suddenly opens into a grand hall characterized by towering green marble columns and a large fireplace. The camera then glides across an ornate rug, passing a student by the hearth before moving toward tall arched windows that flood the interior with bright, green-tinted natural light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that retreats from a bright windowed area to ascend toward a luminous domed ceiling. It begins as the character turns away from the natural light, moving back through the common room where the glow shifts to a warmer interior palette as the central fireplace and wooden cabinets come back into view. As the camera passes other students, the scene opens up to reveal a grand staircase characterized by ornate stone balustrades and intricate gothic details. The movement then carries the viewer upward, passing wall sconces and climbing toward the top of the stairs. Finally, the perspective reaches a statue positioned beneath a bright skylight that floods the domed architecture with light.
